Scribble Party

# Scribble Party

Launching today

## A local-first whiteboard studio for teachers and creators

14 followers

## A local-first whiteboard studio for teachers and creators

14 followers

Visit website

Digital whiteboards

Most lesson recorders send your video to someone's cloud and want an account first. Scribble Party runs entirely in your browser. Draw on an infinite canvas, drop a live camera bubble of yourself on the board (it cuts out your background), and record the whole thing with your voice. Recordings save to your device as you go, so a crashed tab doesn't lose a take. Works offline as an installed app. No signup, no install, nothing ever uploaded!

results.title: Writing | Product Hunt
results.content:
## Highest rated writing products

Highest rated

Among top-reviewed writing tools, Notion excels as an all-in-one workspace—databases, calendars, and collaborative wikis—for content planning and team docs. Obsidian suits local-first Markdown writers needing deep linking, plugins, and research-heavy knowledge bases. Craft.do blends structure and polish with a block editor, collections, real-time collaboration, and publishing—ideal for visually rich notes, briefs, and shareable docs.

results.title: Scribble Network: The product that makes AI recommend your brand | Product Hunt
results.content:
Subscribe

Scribble Network

# Scribble Network

## The product that makes AI recommend your brand

4.3•4 reviews•

771 followers

## The product that makes AI recommend your brand

4.3•4 reviews•

771 followers

Visit website

GEO Tools

Your customers ask AI before they ask Google, and most brands have no idea whether they show up or lose to a competitor. Every other tool hands you a visibility score and stops there. Scribble does the whole loop: audit where you're invisible across every AI engine, create content that closes the gap, and amplify it through 50,000 creators who only get paid when AI cites them. A gap report won't win customers. Being the cited answer will.

 Overview
 Reviews4
 Alternatives
 Built with
 Forum
 Team
 Awards

Free Options [...] View all

4.3

Based on 4 reviews

Review Scribble Network?

Reviews

Most Informative

•30 reviews

#### What's great

The architectural integration of Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) tracking pipelines with a decentralized User Generated Content (UGC) creator database addresses the core distribution bottleneck of AI search optimization. By parsing citations across primary language models like Perplexity, Gemini, and GPT daily, the platform tracks structural visibility gaps on target search matrices. The programmatic coordination layer automatically dispatches content objectives to a vetted registry of 50,000 creators, ensuring localized data footprints are seeded directly onto indexed web spaces where retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) engines extract their reference nodes. [...] #### vs Alternatives

looked at a couple of the pure AI-visibility-score dashboards first, but those just tell you the same thing every month without giving you a way to actually move the number

Ratings

Ease of use

Reliability

Value for money

Customization

Report

 22 views

•49 reviews

#### What's great

Ran an audit for a brand I follow and the gap between "here's your visibility score" and "here's actually what to do about it" is exactly where most GEO tools stop — Scribble is the first one I've tried that closes the loop instead of just handing you a diagnostic and leaving you to figure out distribution yourself.

#### What needs improvement

Would love more clarity on quality control for the 50,000-creator pool —
